pageContext.name: Peacemaker
pageContext.description: I made a vow to have peace no matter how many people I have to kill to get it.   Sideshow presents the Peacemaker Fine Art Print, a vivacious and celebratory DC Comics art print by artist Travis Knight.  Eat peace, art collectors! The Peacemaker Fine Art Print features Christopher Smith and his best pal Eagly the eagle in all their glory. Both of their skeletons are revealed in the bold lines of an X-ray vision motif. Wearing his signature silver helmet, Peacemaker shows off his impressive muscles while Eagly salutes the American flag that overlays our patriotic pair. But Eagly's not the only fair-feathered friend pictured. Peacemaker's graceful Dove of Peace adorns his chest and head, reminding everyone that this violent vigilante is all for armistice — through armed warfare!  Inspired by James Gunn's Peacemaker television series, this stylish DC Comics collectible, presented as an unframed fine art giclée print or in a custom framed format, is exactly what Peacemaker fans need to honor their favorite super hero. Each Peacemaker Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature as well as an embossed Seal of Authenticity as part of the limited edition of 300 pieces.  Pledge your allegiance to Christopher Smith and his esteemed avian when you bring home the Peacemaker Fine Art Print by Travis Knight today!
